guides.text: The goal is $I \to I$ — 'if $I$, then $I$.' To prove an [implication|implication], we assume the left-hand side and try to reach the right-hand side.

Now we have $\{I\} \vdash I$ at step 1 — the conclusion is exactly the assumption. To finish, use `->-intro` to [discharge|discharge] the assumption $I$ and close the proof. Its first argument is the [formula|formula] to [discharge|discharge] and the second is the step number:
